name: landing-marketplace-dropdown
afterText: Settleway Marketplace Buy Review verified agricultural supply. Sell Respond to active buyer requirements. How It Works Trust & Settlement Login Bilateral trade assurance on Stellar Testnet Trade with commitment on both sides. Discover supply and demand, negotiate commercial terms, secure buyer principal and bilateral bonds, verify delivery, and preserve settlement proof on Stellar. Explore Marketplace See How It Works BUYER ASSURANCE Pre-lock intent Principal + commitment bond The buyer prepares purchase value and a seriousness bond before escrow can lock. Buyer principal Buyer bond SELLER ASSURANCE Performance bond The seller commits delivery seriousness before protected execution begins. Mutual terms gate Commercial terms locked by both sides Evidence verification Stellar-backed settlement ONE CONNECTED TRADE WORKSPACE Every serious step belongs to the same transaction story. Discover Supply Compare agricultural lots, origin, quantity, price, and seller confidence. Post Buyer Demand Signal verified purchasing intent before a protected room opens. Negotiate Terms Keep price, quantity, delivery, and evidence expectations in one recorded thread. Secure Commitments Buyer principal and bilateral bonds create visible seriousness on both sides. Verify Delivery Evidence hashes and room milestones preserve the execution story. Settle on Stellar Testnet references support inspectable funding, lock, refund, and settlement proof. THE PRODUCT MECHANISM A corridor designed to slow down the risky moments. Discovery stays open. Commercial terms become explicit. Funding begins only after mutual commitment. Evidence and settlement remain part of the same room. 1 Discover 2 Negotiate 3 Both Commit 4 Verify 5 Settle BILATERAL ASSURANCE Capital, commitment, evidence, and outcome remain legible. Buyer principal 100% protected deal value Buyer commitment bond 5% seriousness signal Seller performance bond 5% delivery commitment Platform fee 0.5% per party where applicable Deterministic s

name: listing-submit-offer
afterText: Settleway Buy Sell Deals SS Back to Buy marketplace SELLER LISTING Red Chili (Bird's Eye Chili) Fresh harvest from Probolinggo group. Sorted and ready for pickup or delivery. Ready stock Offer before escrow Bird's Eye Chili Grade A Submit Offer starts recorded negotiation. The active room opens only after accepted terms and mutual commitment. Listing Snapshot Available volume 700 kg Price per kg Rp 28.500 /kg Origin Probolinggo Availability Available now Seller Description Probolinggo Farmer Group is offering 700 kg of Bird's Eye Chili Grade A from Probolinggo. This lot is already sorted and ready for buyer review, pickup coordination, or delivery scheduling. Buyers should use the recorded negotiation to confirm final quantity, price, grading expectations, packaging, delivery handoff, and the product photos or documents that should be attached before the protected Deal Room opens. Seller notes are part of pre-deal context. Final commercial terms must still be confirmed through Submit Offer and the recorded negotiation thread. What to clarify next Quality grade and sorting tolerance Delivery timing and handoff location Photos, receipts, or quality documents Recorded negotiation is the first gate Buyers and sellers discuss price, quantity, delivery, quality, and evidence before any deposit or escrow action begins.
